# Support

## Getting Help

- **Documentation**: See the [README](../README.md) and [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) for project structure and architecture
- **Issues**: Search [existing issues](https://github.com/ZerosAndOnesLLC/AiFw/issues) before opening a new one
- **Security**: Report vulnerabilities to support@zerosandones.us (see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md))

## Reporting Issues

1. Check if the issue already exists
2. Use the appropriate issue template:
   - [Bug Report](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md)
   - [Feature Request](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md)
3. Include version info, logs, and steps to reproduce

## Commercial Support

For commercial support, consulting, or enterprise deployments, contact:

**support@zerosandones.us**
